I can help with medical terminology! Use: medical <term> in <language>
Please provide the medical term and I'll look it up for you.
I can provide medical definitions. Use: medical <term> in <language>
I can explain clinical terms. Use: medical <term> in <language>
I have a comprehensive medical vocabulary database. What term do you need?
I can define medical terms in multiple languages. Use: medical <term> in <language>
I can translate medical terms to Spanish. Use: medical <term> in Spanish
A diagnosis is a clinical determination of the nature of a patient's condition.
I can explain medical terminology. Use: medical <term> in <language>
Sure! Provide the term and target language. Use: medical <term> in <language>
Hypertension is a condition where blood pressure in the arteries is persistently elevated.
Diabetes is a metabolic disease that causes high blood sugar levels due to insulin issues.
CBC stands for Complete Blood Count - a blood test measuring red/white cells and platelets.
Sepsis is a life-threatening condition caused by the body's response to an infection.
Tachycardia is a heart rate that exceeds the normal resting rate (over 100 bpm in adults).
I can help decode clinical jargon. Use: medical <term> in <language>
Bradycardia is a slower-than-normal heart rate (below 60 bpm in adults).
Edema is swelling caused by excess fluid trapped in the body's tissues.
Anemia is a condition where there aren't enough healthy red blood cells to carry oxygen.
